description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a skeletonized folding stock and a detachable box magazine. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, supporting a mounted red dot sight for rapid target acquisition. The handguard is ribbed and also features Picatinny rails for accessory attachment, while the barrel is short and ends without any visible muzzle device. The pistol grip is ergonomic and textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is pronounced for gloved use. The overall design is tactical, lightweight, and optimized for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with a folding skeletonized stock, red dot sight, and detachable box magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the folding skeletonized stock, red dot sight, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, Picatinny rail, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the alignment of the sight and rail system.
